data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(to_date('!op_date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy'))as op_date , '!as_letter_1!' as as_letter , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no)as member_name
, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.principal_of_loan , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.interest , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.principal_not , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.interest_not , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount_not , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.ukpaid_agent_p , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.ukpaid_agent_i , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.ukpaid_agent_a , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.ukpaid_after_p , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.ukpaid_after_i , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.ukpaid_after_a , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.principal_balance_of_loan
, decode( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.posted_run,'0',sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.principal_balance_of_loan, (case (select sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_group from sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type where sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_code = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code) when 'LON' then sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.mpost_principal_balance + SC_KEP_T_MONTHLY_RECEIVE_DET.unkeep_principal_of_loan end )) as c_amount
, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( decode( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.posted_run,'0',sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.principal_balance_of_loan, (case (select sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_group from sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type where sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_code = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code) when 'LON' then sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.mpost_principal_balance + SC_KEP_T_MONTHLY_RECEIVE_DET.unkeep_principal_of_loan end )) )as c_amount_thai
, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount
, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no)as coll_group_no --ที่อยู่ปัจจุบัน , (case when sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in ('01') then pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 6 ) else sc_lon_m_contract_coll.address_no end) as address_no , (case when sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in ('01') then pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 8 ) else sc_lon_m_contract_coll.moo end) as moo , (case when sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in ('01') then pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 7 ) else sc_lon_m_contract_coll.moo_ban end) as mooban , (case when sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in ('01') then pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 10 ) else sc_lon_m_contract_coll.soi end) as soi , (case when sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in ('01') then pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 9 ) else sc_lon_m_contract_coll.road end) as road , (case when sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in ('01') then pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 11 ) else sc_lon_m_contract_coll.tambol end) as tambol , (case when sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in ('01') then pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 12 ) else pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.province_code,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.district_code) end) as district , (case when sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in ('01') then pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 13 ) else pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.province_code) end) as province , (case when sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in ('01') then pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 14 ) else sc_lon_m_contract_coll.postcode end) as postcode , (case when sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in ('01') then pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 15 ) else pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.telephone) end) as telephone
, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.group_section , case when sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code = 'ML01' then 'ฉุกเฉิน' when sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code = 'ML02' then 'สามัญ' else 'พิเศษ' end as keeping_type , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year + 543 as receive_year , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month)as month_name
from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det , sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive where 1=1 and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_description = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in ('01','12','13') and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = 2025 and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = 8 --and (sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.principal_of_loan > sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.principal_not or sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.interest > sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.interest_not ) and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount > (sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount_not + nvl(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.ukpaid_after_a,0) + nvl(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.ukpaid_agent_a,0)) and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code in ('ML01' , 'ML02' , 'ML03') --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '018742'
order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.group_section , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_seq
